series_metadata.series_description: Interagency information sharing agreements which are legal agreements/contracts between the Ohio Bureau of Employment Services and various county, state and federal agencies for the purpose of sharing confidential wage, claim, employer, and/or employment and training information.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office expiration of agreement and 2 years in records center ; Electronic: draftagreement/contacts nolonger of administrative value
